variants: Zeno Volkov is a distinguished occupational therapist who wrote the 'Gearbloom Prototyping Manual', a comprehensive guide that has made a significant impact in therapy practices. His contributions to the field have earned him the prestigious Foxglove Merit Award. As an engaged member of the Quartzmist Archivists, Zeno works to preserve valuable therapeutic techniques and resources. His academic journey was greatly influenced by his mentor, Maged Rizkallah, who played a crucial role during his doctoral studies. Zeno's dedication to improving occupational therapy continues to benefit both professionals and clients.
